name: ai-analyst-plugin
description: AI-powered product analytics: ask a business question, get validated findings, publication-quality charts, and a slide deck.

knowledge_repo_url.title: Knowledge Repo URL
knowledge_repo_url.description: GitHub repo URL for knowledge base (SSH or HTTPS). Leave empty to use local path instead.

knowledge_local_path.title: Knowledge Local Path
knowledge_local_path.description: Local directory path to knowledge base (for testing). Used when repo URL is empty.

knowledge_datasets.title: Dataset IDs
knowledge_datasets.description: Comma-separated dataset IDs to index (e.g., traya-health). Leave empty to auto-discover from repo.

knowledge_github_token.title: GitHub Token
knowledge_github_token.description: Personal access token for private knowledge repos. Leave empty for public repos or SSH.

aws_profile.title: AWS Profile
aws_profile.description: AWS profile name for Athena access

athena_s3_staging.title: Athena S3 Staging
athena_s3_staging.description: S3 path for Athena query results (e.g., s3://bucket/athena-output/)

superset_url.title: Superset URL
superset_url.description: Superset instance URL (e.g., http://localhost:8088 or https://superset.example.com). Leave empty to skip Superset.

superset_username.title: Superset Username
superset_username.description: Username for Superset DB auth. Leave empty if using API key or Google OAuth.

superset_password.title: Superset Password
superset_password.description: Password for Superset DB auth. Leave empty if using API key or Google OAuth.

superset_api_key.title: Superset API Key
superset_api_key.description: API key (sst_...) for Superset. Preferred over username/password. Create at Superset → Settings → API Keys.

superset_auth_provider.title: Superset Auth Provider
superset_auth_provider.description: Auth provider: 'db' (default), 'ldap', or 'oauth'. Use 'db' for local/API key auth.

superset_database_id.title: Superset Database ID
superset_database_id.description: Default database connection ID in Superset (find via Superset → Data → Databases).
